subject: Add portal option to ete test script
commit_message:
Add portal option to ete test script

Change-Id: I42011b0dae86eb96b52764085adfccbb8e062b9d
Issue-ID: PORTAL-388
Signed-off-by: Gary Wu <gary.i.wu@huawei.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/419/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-verify-helm/419

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+2 Verified+1

The review works. However the test fails.
Do not think the failure is related to this review though.

root@borislav-rancher:~/onap/master/oom/kubernetes/robot# ./ete-k8s.sh onap portal
++ export NAMESPACE=onap
++ NAMESPACE=onap
+++ sed 's/ .*//'
+++ kubectl --namespace onap get pods
+++ grep robot
++ POD=aaa-robot-64c587c6b7-qkg84
++ export 'TAGS=-i portal'
++ TAGS='-i portal'
++ export ETEHOME=/var/opt/OpenECOMP_ETE
++ ETEHOME=/var/opt/OpenECOMP_ETE
+++ kubectl --namespace onap exec aaa-robot-64c587c6b7-qkg84 -- bash -c 'ls -1q /share/logs/ | wc -l'
++ export GLOBAL_BUILD_NUMBER=2
++ GLOBAL_BUILD_NUMBER=2
+++ printf %04d 2
++ export OUTPUT_FOLDER=ETE_0002_portal
++ OUTPUT_FOLDER=ETE_0002_portal
++ VARIABLEFILES='-V /share/config/vm_properties.py -V /share/config/integration_robot_properties.py -V /share/config/integration_preload_parameters.py'
++ VARIABLES='-v GLOBAL_BUILD_NUMBER:1813'
++ kubectl --namespace onap exec aaa-robot-64c587c6b7-qkg84 -- /var/opt/OpenECOMP_ETE/runTags.sh -V /share/config/vm_properties.py -V /share/config/integration_robot_properties.py -V /share/config/integration_preload_parameters.py -v GLOBAL_BUILD_NUMBER:1813 -d /share/logs/ETE_0002_portal -i portal --display 88
